# Interactive Visualization in Python | 交互可视化

该数据来自于[Kaggle House Price Prediction](https://www.kaggle.com/c/house-prices-advanced-regression-techniques/overview)，在爱荷华州艾姆斯市，79个解释变量描述了住宅的各个方面，要求通过已有的自变量预测每一套住宅的最终价格。

数据来源：[训练集](https://www.kaggle.com/c/house-prices-advanced-regression-techniques/data?select=train.csv)、[测试集](https://www.kaggle.com/c/house-prices-advanced-regression-techniques/data?select=test.csv)、[数据说明](https://www.kaggle.com/c/house-prices-advanced-regression-techniques/data?select=data_description.txt)


```python
import plotly.express as px
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots
import plotly.figure_factory as ff
from plotly.offline import iplot  # 用于离线
import plotly
```

## 数据读入与概览

首先通过简单的行列名查看、因变量描述统计和数据表格的展示对数据进行初步的概览：


```python
df_train = pd.read_csv('./data/train.csv')
df_train.columns
```




    Index(['Id', 'MSSubClass', 'MSZoning', 'LotFrontage', 'LotArea', 'Street',
           'Alley', 'LotShape', 'LandContour', 'Utilities', 'LotConfig',
           'LandSlope', 'Neighborhood', 'Condition1', 'Condition2', 'BldgType',
           'HouseStyle', 'OverallQual', 'OverallCond', 'YearBuilt', 'YearRemodAdd',
           'RoofStyle', 'RoofMatl', 'Exterior1st', 'Exterior2nd', 'MasVnrType',
           'MasVnrArea', 'ExterQual', 'ExterCond', 'Foundation', 'BsmtQual',
           'BsmtCond', 'BsmtExposure', 'BsmtFinType1', 'BsmtFinSF1',
           'BsmtFinType2', 'BsmtFinSF2', 'BsmtUnfSF', 'TotalBsmtSF', 'Heating',
           'HeatingQC', 'CentralAir', 'Electrical', '1stFlrSF', '2ndFlrSF',
           'LowQualFinSF', 'GrLivArea', 'BsmtFullBath', 'BsmtHalfBath', 'FullBath',
           'HalfBath', 'BedroomAbvGr', 'KitchenAbvGr', 'KitchenQual',
           'TotRmsAbvGrd', 'Functional', 'Fireplaces', 'FireplaceQu', 'GarageType',
           'GarageYrBlt', 'GarageFinish', 'GarageCars', 'GarageArea', 'GarageQual',
           'GarageCond', 'PavedDrive', 'WoodDeckSF', 'OpenPorchSF',
           'EnclosedPorch', '3SsnPorch', 'ScreenPorch', 'PoolArea', 'PoolQC',
           'Fence', 'MiscFeature', 'MiscVal', 'MoSold', 'YrSold', 'SaleType',
           'SaleCondition', 'SalePrice'],
          dtype='object')




```python
# 房价描述性统计
df_train['SalePrice'].describe()
```




    count      1460.000000
    mean     180921.195890
    std       79442.502883
    min       34900.000000
    25%      129975.000000
    50%      163000.000000
    75%      214000.000000
    max      755000.000000
    Name: SalePrice, dtype: float64



使用`plotly.graph_objectsTable()`进行表格交互可视化，更多案例请参考[Tables in Python](https://plotly.com/python/table/)

`header`: 标题内容  
`cells`: 表格正文内容  
`values`: 列表形式的展示数据  
`fill_color`: 表格填充颜色  
`align`: 文本布局


```python
# 交互表格展示
fig = go.Figure(data = [go.Table(
    header = dict(values = list(df_train.columns[:5]),
#                 fill_color='paleturquoise',
                align = 'center'),
    cells = dict(values = [df_train.Id, df_train.MSSubClass, df_train.MSZoning, 
                       df_train.LotFrontage, df_train.LotArea],
#                fill_color='lavender',
               align = 'center'))
])
# fig.show()
# 可以使用鼠标拖动不同的列，进行列的位置互换
iplot(fig)
# plotly.offline.plot(fig, filename = 'fig1.html', validate = False)
```

var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>





    'fig1.html'



在分析之前，需要查看每个变量是否有缺失值，通过统计缺失值的数量与占比，进行交互可视化展示。使用的图形为**柱状图、双坐标柱状图**：


```python
# 按照变量进行缺失值统计
total = df_train.isnull().sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
# 计算占比
percent = (df_train.isnull().sum()/df_train.isnull().count()).sort_values(ascending=False)
# 合并数据框
missing_data = pd.concat([total, percent], axis=1, keys=['Total', 'Percent'])
missing_plt = missing_data.head(20)
missing_plt
```

使用`plotly.express.bar()`绘制柱状图，更多案例与函数说明请参考[Bar chart with Plotly Express](https://plotly.com/python/bar-charts/)

`data_frame`: 绘图的数据（DataFrame or array-like or dict）  
`x`: 横轴数据  
`y`: 纵轴数据  
`color`: 柱子的填充颜色，可以指定颜色或根据某变量的取值变化  
`labels`: 图中的自定义标签


```python
# 绘制柱状图
fig = px.bar(missing_plt, x=missing_plt.index, y='Total', color='Total',
             labels={'index': 'Variable Name', 'Total':'Number of Missing value'}, height=400)
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
# plotly.offline.plot(fig)
```

var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


将缺失值数量与缺失值占比同时展示在一张图中，则需要构建双坐标轴，使用`plotly.subplots.make_subplots()`函数，通过逐层`add_trace()`，分别进行第一个轴、第二个轴的绘制：


```python
# 创建双坐标轴的画布
fig = make_subplots(specs=[[{"secondary_y": True}]])

# Add traces
fig.add_trace(
    go.Bar(x=missing_plt.index, y=missing_plt.Total, name="yaxis data"),
    secondary_y=False,
)
fig.add_trace(
    go.Scatter(x=missing_plt.index, y=missing_plt.Percent, name="yaxis2 data"),
    secondary_y=True,
)

# 图像标题
fig.update_layout(title_text="变量缺失值数量及占比")
# X轴标题
fig.update_xaxes(title_text="xaxis title")
# Y轴标题，使用html标签进行文本加粗等变换
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="<b>primary</b> yaxis title", secondary_y=False)
fig.update_yaxes(title_text="<b>secondary</b> yaxis title", secondary_y=True)

# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

var gd = document.getElementById('83015511-329a-45ed-858c-fc2b8694df19');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

## 探索性分析

为了探究什么因素可能对房价产生影响，首先对解释变量与房价进行描述性分析。

### 单变量

不同房屋类型的面积是否有明显的区别，绘制不同房屋类型对应的房屋面积累积柱状图：


```python
lotarea = df_train.groupby('MSZoning')["LotArea"].mean().values
masarea = df_train.groupby('MSZoning')["MasVnrArea"].mean().values
grlivarea = df_train.groupby('MSZoning')["GrLivArea"].mean().values
grarea = df_train.groupby('MSZoning')["GarageArea"].mean().values
poolarea = df_train.groupby('MSZoning')["PoolArea"].mean().values
areatype = df_train.groupby('MSZoning')["PoolArea"].mean().index
```

通过不断叠加`add_trace()`逐层添加柱状图。注意：这里的房屋面积是可以叠加的，如果变量叠加是没有意义的，则可以绘制邻接柱状图，具体可以参考[Bar Charts in Python](https://plotly.com/python/bar-charts/)。


```python
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
    y=areatype, x=lotarea,
    name='lotarea', orientation='h',
    marker=dict(
        color='rgba(17, 171, 122, 0.6)',
        line=dict(color='rgba(17, 171, 122, 1.0)', width=1)
    )
))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
    y=areatype, x=masarea,
    name='masarea', orientation='h',
    marker=dict(
        color='rgba(17, 143, 171, 0.6)',
        line=dict(color='rgba(17, 143, 171, 1.0)', width=1)
    )
))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
    y=areatype, x=grlivarea,
    name='grlivarea', orientation='h',
    marker=dict(
        color='rgba(17, 104, 171, 0.6)',
        line=dict(color='rgba(17, 104, 171, 1.0)', width=1)
    )
))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
    y=areatype, x=grarea,
    name='grarea', orientation='h',
    marker=dict(
        color='rgba(17, 145, 171, 0.6)',
        line=dict(color='rgba(17, 145, 171, 1.0)', width=1)
    )
))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
    y=areatype, x=poolarea,
    name='poolarea', orientation='h',
    marker=dict(
        color='rgba(81, 17, 171, 0.6)',
        line=dict(color='rgba(81, 17, 171, 1.0)', width=1)
    )
))
# 通过调整`barmode`参数的取值，来调整堆积或邻接的形式
fig.update_layout(barmode='stack')
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

var gd = document.getElementById('873762a2-c76b-49a4-9ba8-5df2ee83e102');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


绘制因变量房价的**分布直方图**，观察房价的分布状况，使用`plotly.express.histogram()`函数，指定数据框和展示变量，更多示例可以参考[Histograms in Python](https://plotly.com/python/histograms/)、[plotly.express.histogram](https://plotly.com/python-api-reference/generated/plotly.express.histogram.html)。

`data_frame`: 绘图数据框  
`x`: 进行直方图描述的变量  
`nbins`: 柱子的数目，可以自定义  
`labels`: 自定义柱子上的标签  
`log_y`: 是否给y轴取对数，默认为False  
`color_discrete_sequence`: 自定义颜色


```python
fig = px.histogram(df_train, x="SalePrice", 
                  color_discrete_sequence=['#A4CCD9'])
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

  {"responsive": true}                    ).then(function(){

var gd = document.getElementById('0704d0eb-576c-4c42-8bd8-c43e908cd9fe');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


如果希望把直方图与统计学数值特征一起展示出来（比如核密度估计曲线、轴须图等），可以使用`plotly.figure_factory.create_distplot()`。更多示例请参考[Distplots in Python](https://plotly.com/python/distplot/)。

`hist_data` ((list[list])): 以列表的形式包含要展示的数据  
`group_labels` ((list[str])): 每一个数据对应的标签  
`bin_size` ((list[float]|float)): 直方图柱子的宽度，默认为1


```python
group_labels = ['SalePrice']
hist_data = [df_train['SalePrice'].values]
fig = ff.create_distplot(hist_data, group_labels, bin_size = 5000)
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

0.25], "dtick": 1, "showticklabels": false}},                        {"responsive": true}                    ).then(function(){

var gd = document.getElementById('cf85c7e6-3ad6-4805-9e23-56bec4082352');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


通过直方图结果可以看出，因变量房价是呈现明显的**右偏分布**的，在建模时需要额外注意因变量的数据变换。

### 多变量

什么变量会对房价有影响呢？首先考虑地面上的居住面积，是否地面居住面积越大，房价越高？绘制**两个连续变量的散点图**观察其中存在的规律。使用`plotly.express.scatter()`，更多散点图相关的示例可以参考[Scatter Plots in Python](https://plotly.com/python/line-and-scatter/)。

`data_frame`: 绘图的数据框  
`x`: 横轴变量  
`y`: 纵轴变量  
`color`: 控制散点颜色的变量  
`size`: 控制散点大小的变量


```python
var = 'GrLivArea'
fig = px.scatter(df_train, x = var, y = "SalePrice", color = 'LandSlope')
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

可以在图中添加使用这两个变量进行最小二乘回归的直线，设定参数`trendline = 'ols'`：


```python
fig = px.scatter(df_train, x=var, y="SalePrice", opacity=0.65, trendline="ols", trendline_color_override='darkblue')
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{

            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();

}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells

if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

在第一张散点图中，我们使用不同的`LandSlope`（坡度）控制了不同散点的颜色，如果想同时考虑是否有中央空调，可以选择一个变量进行**分面绘图**，设置`facet_col = "LandSlope"`，即可使用`LandSlope`变量进行分面：

更多分面绘图相关的示例请参考[Facet and Trellis Plots in Python](https://plotly.com/python/facet-plots/)。


```python
fig = px.scatter(df_train, x=var, y="SalePrice", color="CentralAir", facet_col="LandSlope")
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

var gd = document.getElementById('cef8d0e1-8243-4f77-abcb-08a0a8ee4418');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


可以看出，随着地面居住面积增大，房价呈现上升趋势。

接下来考察房屋材料与装修的整体评级是否对房价有影响？绘制**一个定性变量和一个定量变量的直方图**观察其中存在的规律。使用`plotly.express.box()`，更多直方图相关的示例可以参考[Box Plots in Python](https://plotly.com/python/box-plots/)。


```python
var = 'OverallQual'
# 整合绘图数据
data = pd.concat([df_train['SalePrice'], df_train[var]], axis=1)
fig = px.box(data, x=var, y="SalePrice")
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

"zerolinewidth": 2}}}, "xaxis": {"anchor": "y", "domain": [0.0, 1.0], "title": {"text": "OverallQual"}}, "yaxis": {"anchor": "x", "domain": [0.0, 1.0], "title": {"text": "SalePrice"}}},                        {"responsive": true}                    ).then(function(){

var gd = document.getElementById('509c460f-2517-4f9d-a67a-b270c704e2d3');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


从两方面解读直方图：

- 平均水平（中位数）：整体评分等级更高的房子房价水平越高；  
- 波动水平（标准差）：整体评分等级更高的房子房价波动区间更大；

考察变量之间是否存在较强的相关性？通过绘制**热力图矩阵**，展示多个变量之间的相关系数。使用`plotly.figure_factory.create_annotated_heatmap()`函数，更多热力图请参考[Annotated Heatmaps in Python](https://plotly.com/python/annotated-heatmap/)。

`z`: 创建热力图的矩阵  
`x`: 横轴标签  
`y`: 纵轴标签  
`annotation_text`: 矩阵元素的标签  
`colorscale`: 颜色设置  
`showscale`: 是否展示填充颜色尺度


```python
k = 10 # 指定绘制热力图矩阵的变量个数
corrmat = df_train.corr()  # 相关系数矩阵
cols = corrmat.nlargest(k, 'SalePrice')['SalePrice'].index  # 提取前k个相关系数最大的变量
cols.values  # 变量名如下
# ['SalePrice', 'OverallQual', 'GrLivArea', 'GarageCars',
#        'GarageArea', 'TotalBsmtSF', '1stFlrSF', 'FullBath',
#        'TotRmsAbvGrd', 'YearBuilt']
tick = list(cols.values)  # 作为矩阵的横纵轴标题
cm = np.corrcoef(df_train[cols].values.T)
fig = ff.create_annotated_heatmap(cm, colorscale='Viridis', 
                                  annotation_text=cm.round(2),
                                 x = tick, y = tick, showscale = True)
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

var gd = document.getElementById('caa70a82-f322-43c9-ae3f-514824d579ae');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


为了探究房价随着时间变化是否有明显的上升或下降趋势，绘制**折线图**，在绘制折线图之前，需要将横轴坐标转换为时间型数据，可以使用`pandas.to_datetime()`函数，设置参数`format`指定数据格式。统计每一年具有代表性的数字特征，这里以房价均值为例，得到的数据框如下：


```python
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
builtyear_time = pd.to_datetime(df_train.YearBuilt, format='%Y')
df_train["builtyear_time"] = builtyear_time

sale_year = df_train.groupby('builtyear_time')["SalePrice"].mean()
price_year = pd.DataFrame({"year": sale_year.index,
                           "price": sale_year.values})
price_year
```

使用函数`plotly.express.line()`，更多折线图示例请参考[Line Charts in Python](https://plotly.com/python/line-charts/)。


```python
fig = px.line(price_year, x="year", y="price", title='不同年份的房价均值')
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

"xaxis": {"anchor": "y", "domain": [0.0, 1.0], "title": {"text": "year"}}, "yaxis": {"anchor": "x", "domain": [0.0, 1.0], "title": {"text": "price"}}},                        {"responsive": true} var gd = document.getElementById('f97ded15-de2c-48f8-94fb-a4bd4bd2a0ed');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


如果要在一张画布上展示多条折线，可以使用`add_trace()`函数，逐层添加折线。这里绘制每一年房价的最小值、均值和最大值如下：


```python
# 如果要画多条折线
sale_min = df_train.groupby('builtyear_time')["SalePrice"].min().values
sale_mean = df_train.groupby('builtyear_time')["SalePrice"].mean().values
sale_max = df_train.groupby('builtyear_time')["SalePrice"].max().values
year = df_train.groupby('builtyear_time')["SalePrice"].max().index
fig = go.Figure()
# 创建并且自定义每一个图层的样子
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=year, y=sale_min, name='min ',
                         line=dict(color='firebrick', width=4)))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=year, y=sale_mean, name = 'mean',
                         line=dict(color='royalblue', width=4, dash = 'dash')))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=year, y=sale_max, name='max',
                         line=dict(color='orange', width=4)))

# 展示图
fig.update_layout(title='Min, Mean and Max Sale Price by Year',
                   xaxis_title='Year',
                   yaxis_title='SalePrice')
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

通过折线图可以看出，虽然有微小的波动，但是房价整体随着时间的推移而呈现上升趋势，尤其是最高价的上升趋势更为明显。

## 数据建模与可视化

在探索性分析之后，我们使用数据中可能会影响房价的变量作为自变量，建立回归模型，预测房价。为了对建模结果可视化，选择在热力图矩阵中和房价相关性最高的两个变量作为自变量（`GrLivArea`, `OverallQual`），对数房价作为因变量，建立回归模型如下：


```python
df_train = pd.read_csv('./data/train.csv')
# 拟合模型
from sklearn import linear_model
mylasso = linear_model.LassoLarsCV(max_iter=10000)
X = df_train[['GrLivArea', 'OverallQual']]
Y = df_train['SalePrice'].values
mylasso.fit(X, np.log(Y))
```




    LassoLarsCV(copy_X=True, cv=None, eps=2.220446049250313e-16, fit_intercept=True,
                max_iter=10000, max_n_alphas=1000, n_jobs=None, normalize=True,
                positive=False, precompute='auto', verbose=False)



由于自变量为2D，可以绘制三维坐标系展示预测结果的情况。


```python
mesh_size = 1
margin = 0
# 创建一个网格点坐标矩阵
x_min, x_max = X.GrLivArea.min() - margin, X.GrLivArea.max() + margin
y_min, y_max = X.OverallQual.min() - margin, X.OverallQual.max() + margin
xrange = np.arange(x_min, x_max, mesh_size)
yrange = np.arange(y_min, y_max, mesh_size)
xx, yy = np.meshgrid(xrange, yrange)
```


```python
# 预测内样本
pred = np.exp(mylasso.predict(np.c_[xx.ravel(), yy.ravel()]))
pred = pred.reshape(xx.shape)
```

在预测之后，我们将预测的曲面和真实的内样本因变量取值绘制出3D图像，首先使用`plotly.express.scatter_3d()`函数绘制出散点，然后使用`add_trace()`逐层叠加曲面，更多3D图像示例请参考[3D Surface Plots in Python](https://plotly.com/python/3d-surface-plots/)、[3D Scatter Plots in Python](https://plotly.com/python/3d-scatter-plots/)，更多建模结果展示图像请参考[ML Regression in Python](https://plotly.com/python/ml-regression/)。


```python
# Generate the plot
fig = px.scatter_3d(df_train, x='GrLivArea', y='OverallQual', z='SalePrice')
fig.update_traces(marker=dict(size=5))
fig.add_traces(go.Surface(x=xrange, y=yrange, z=pred, name='pred_surface'))
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

{"backgroundcolor": "#E5ECF6", "gridcolor": "white", "gridwidth": 2, "linecolor": "white", "showbackground": true, "ticks": "", "zerolinecolor": "white"}}, "shapedefaults": {"line": {"color": "#2a3f5f"}}, "ternary": {"aaxis": {"gridcolor": "white", "linecolor": "white", "ticks": ""}, "baxis": {"gridcolor": "white", "linecolor": "white", "ticks": ""}, "bgcolor": "#E5ECF6", "caxis": {"gridcolor": "white", "linecolor": "white", "ticks": ""}}, "title": {"x": 0.05}, "xaxis": {"automargin": true, "gridcolor": "white", "linecolor": "white", "ticks": "", "title": {"standoff": 15}, "zerolinecolor": "white", "zerolinewidth": 2}, "yaxis": {"automargin": true, "gridcolor": "white", "linecolor": "white", "ticks": "", "title": {"standoff": 15}, "zerolinecolor": "white", "zerolinewidth": 2}}}},                        {"responsive": true}                    ).then(function(){

var gd = document.getElementById('dacb4bf8-9fdb-40da-919d-6115e1aed1ee');
var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}

                        })                };                });            </script>        </div>


同样地，可以使用主成分分析（PCA）对原始数据的变量进行降维，如果选择3个主成分，则可以将主成分绘制在3D图像中，更清楚地观察主成分特征。


```python
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA
df_pca = df_train[cols[1:]]
pca = PCA(n_components=3)  # 提取三个主成分
components = pca.fit_transform(df_pca)
```


```python
print('data frame dimension after PCA is: ', components.shape)
```

    data frame dimension after PCA is:  (1460, 3)



```python
total_var = pca.explained_variance_ratio_.sum() * 100
# 绘制主成分3D图
fig = px.scatter_3d(
    components, x=0, y=1, z=2, color = df_train['Foundation'],
    title=f'Total Explained Variance: {total_var:.2f}%',
    labels={'0': 'PC 1', '1': 'PC 2', '2': 'PC 3'}
)
fig.update_traces(marker=dict(size=5))
# fig.show()
iplot(fig)
```

var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{
        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;
        if (!display || display === 'none') {{
            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);
            Plotly.purge(gd);
            observer.disconnect();
        }}
}});

// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells
var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');
if (notebookContainer) {{
    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});
}}

// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell
var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');
if (outputEl) {{
    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});
}}
